## What This PR Does

## Ramp ID and Name

<!-- e.g. ramp-05-rate-limiter -->

## Checklist

### For new ramps (main branch)
- [ ] `README.md` has all required sections: Context, Goal, Requirements, Starter, Acceptance Criteria, Resources
- [ ] Requirements are numbered and testable
- [ ] `starter/` includes dependency files, folder structure, entry point signatures, test stubs
- [ ] `starter/` contains zero implementation logic
- [ ] Test stubs have test names but no assertions
- [ ] Hints (if included) contain no code — only questions or directions
- [ ] No solution code anywhere in this PR
- [ ] Ramp added to root `README.md` index table

### For solutions branch contributions
- [ ] This PR targets the `solutions` branch, not `main`
- [ ] Reference implementation is complete and passes acceptance criteria
- [ ] No changes to spec or starter in this PR

### For bug fixes / spec improvements
- [ ] Describe what was wrong and what changed
